CheckTitle: Lovable apps must enforce a strong password policy
Description: Lovable apps using password authentication must enforce a strong password policy: minimum 8 characters, with uppercase, lowercase, and numeric requirements.
Risk: Weak password policies allow users to create trivially guessable credentials, dramatically increasing the success rate of credential stuffing, dictionary, and brute-force attacks.

Code.Other:
1. Open the Lovable dashboard
2. Navigate to project Settings > Authentication > Password policy
3. Set minimum length to 8 or higher
4. Require at least one uppercase letter, one lowercase letter, and one number
5. Save and re-test signup

Recommendation.Text: Configure password policies that require at least 8 characters with uppercase, lowercase, and numeric character classes. Consider also requiring a symbol and integrating with a breached-password list.
